title: Elsota tomentosa
taxonomy: Elsota tomentosa is classified as a member of the family Rubiaceae. This family is commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is a part of the order Gentianales and the clade asterids. Elsota tomentosa is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Further classification details may vary based on ongoing research and scientific consensus.
